title: DUI refusal suspension
sentence: A driver who refuses to take a breath test after a DUI arrest will have their license suspended for ______ year(s).
example1: Refusal = automatic 1‑year suspension.\br[PT] Recusa = suspensão automática de 1 ano.

title: Zero tolerance BAC limit
sentence: For a driver under 21, any BAC of ______ or higher results in a six‑month suspension.
explanation: Zero Tolerance law.\br[PT] Lei Tolerância Zero.

title: DUI school hours first
sentence: A first DUI conviction requires ______ hours of DUI school.
explanation: First offense = 12 hours. Second or third = 21 hours.\br[PT] Primeira infração = 12 horas. Segunda ou terceira = 21 horas.

title: Texting school zone extra points
sentence: Texting while driving in a school zone adds an additional ______ points to the primary offense.
explanation: Texting = 3 points. School zone adds 3 more.\br[PT] Digitar = 3 pontos. Zona escolar adiciona mais 3.

title: Dark signal treatment
sentence: If a traffic light is completely dark, treat the intersection as a ______-way stop.
explanation: Power outage = all directions stop.\br[PT] Falta de energia = parada em todas as direções.

title: Minor 6 points restriction type
sentence: A driver under 18 who accumulates 6 or more points in 12 months is restricted to driving for ______ purposes only for one year.
explanation: “Business Purposes ONLY” restriction.\br[PT] Restrição “APENAS Finalidades Comerciais”.

title: School bus two‑lane stop direction
sentence: On a two‑lane road, when a school bus stops with red lights flashing, vehicles in ______ directions must stop.
explanation: Unless divided by a raised barrier, both directions stop.\br[PT] A menos que haja uma barreira elevada, as duas direções param.

title: Following distance seconds
sentence: The minimum following distance in normal conditions is ______ seconds.
explanation: Use the 4‑second rule.\br[PT] Use a regra dos 4 segundos.

title: LSV speed limit max
sentence: A low‑speed vehicle may only be operated on roads with a posted speed limit of ______ mph or less.
explanation: LSV top speed 21‑25 mph, restricted to 35 mph roads.\br[PT] VLV velocidade máxima 21‑25 mph, restrita a vias de 35 mph.

title: Parking uphill without curb
sentence: When parking uphill without a curb, turn your wheels to the ______.
explanation: So the car rolls off the road, not into traffic.\br[PT] Para que o carro role para fora da pista, não para o tráfego.

title: School zone sign shape
sentence: A ______-shaped sign indicates a school zone.
explanation: Pentagon = school zone; round = railroad; diamond = warning.\br[PT] Pentágono = zona escolar; redondo = ferrovia; losango = advertência.

title: Tire tread depth 32nds
sentence: A tire must have a minimum tread depth of ______/32 inch.
explanation: 2/32 inch is legal minimum; 3/32 recommended.\br[PT] 2/32 polegada é o mínimo legal; 3/32 recomendado.

title: DUI revocation minimum days
sentence: A first DUI conviction results in license revocation for a minimum of ______ days.
explanation: Minimum 180 days revocation.\br[PT] Revogação mínima de 180 dias.

title: First license fee dollars
sentence: The initial fee for a first Florida driver license is $______.
explanation: $48 for first license, learner’s, and renewals.\br[PT] $48 para primeira licença, permissão e renovações.

title: Non‑resident employment days
sentence: A non‑resident who accepts employment in Florida must obtain a Florida license within ______ days.
explanation: 30 days after starting work or enrolling a child.\br[PT] 30 dias após iniciar o trabalho ou matricular uma criança.

title: Backing up test forbidden mirror
sentence: On the driving skills test, when backing up you may not use the rear‑view mirror or ______ camera.
explanation: You must look directly to the rear.\br[PT] Você deve olhar diretamente para trás.

title: Restriction code B
sentence: Restriction Code B means the driver must wear ______ lenses.
explanation: Code B = corrective lenses (glasses or contacts).\br[PT] Código B = lentes corretivas (óculos ou contatos).

title: Leaving scene property damage points
sentence: Leaving the scene of a crash with property damage over $50 adds ______ points.
explanation: 6 points for leaving the scene.\br[PT] 6 pontos por deixar o local.

title: Driver 80+ renewal exam
sentence: A driver 80 years or older must pass a ______ exam to renew their license.
explanation: Vision exam required; can be done by their own doctor.\br[PT] Exame de vista obrigatório; pode ser feito pelo seu próprio médico.

title: Second offense 50+ over fine
sentence: The fine for a second offense of exceeding the speed limit by more than 50 mph is up to $______.
explanation: Second offense up to $2,500.\br[PT] Segunda infração até $2.500.
